headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks to Consider Right Now
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is packed with companies that have built dominant market positions, making it a core index for investors. A select few continue to innovate and expand, setting themselves up for long-term success.

headline: Martin Marietta (MLM) Surges 3.1%: Is This an Indication of Further Gains?
summary: Martin Marietta (MLM) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock suggests that there could be more strength down the road.
